meaning: v.纰版挒,鍐茬獊 vbl.纰版挒,鍐茬獊
examples: The car collided head-on with a van.
The cars collided during a heavy rainstorm.
As he fell, his head collided with the table.
Just last February, two satellites collided for the first time, creating over 1, 500 new pieces of junk.
The motorcyclist, in his haste to get away, collided with two other cars and came off his bike.
